understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on a tile grid to reach the goal gem (+). The level is won immediately upon landing on the goal, and lost immediately if landing on spike hazards (u/v).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a clickable/breakable tile (x) at a specified target_position to remove it; after any horizontal move (and sometimes after opening a path with a click), gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other solid), hit spikes (instant loss), or reach the goal (win). CLICK does not move the player directly but can change the map so that gravity causes a fall/slide immediately after the click if support is removed. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click.
